violations.text: The establishment could not provide proof that the establishment has a food safety manager that is certified through the Rhode Island Department of Health Center for Food Protection. A certified food safety manager application was given to the person in charge at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/10/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection. -Application provided to PIC at the time of this inspection. *This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 10/06/23. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2023
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. -Establishment shall register a ServSafe certified employee with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager (RI license). New Violation. Correct By: 10/05/2023

ROP crab meat observed at 46 degrees F. in the walk-in cooler. Label says "Keep Frozen". Proper thawing of ROP seafood products reviewed. Staff voluntarily disposed of the ROP crab meat during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/07/2023
